quiz.question: What is AI misinformation?
options: Information generated by AI that may be false or misleading
quiz.correct_answer: Information generated by AI that may be false or misleading

quiz.question: Why do AI hallucinations happen?
options: AI systems verify facts from the internet
AI predicts text patterns instead of understanding truth
quiz.correct_answer: AI predicts text patterns instead of understanding truth

quiz.question: What is the best way to verify AI answers?
options: Check trusted sources and compare information
quiz.correct_answer: Check trusted sources and compare information
